title: Squared²: Dimension Expension
description: This modpack takes my Squared Project and throws a ton of new dimensions together to create a better end-game, new adventures, and biomes to explore to never get bored!
body:
## This is a Squared² Expansion Pack!
Check out [Squared²](https://modrinth.com/modpack/thesquaredproject) to play the Official modpack and learn about what the original modpack brings

# The Dimension Expension

This expansion pack adds a bunch of new dimensions as well as little changes and overhauls to the vanilla ones! Yes, expension is spelled wrong on purpose!

> - **The Aether & Addons**: an end-game alternative to The End, fight hard bosses, loot chests, find better-than-netherite items, and trinkets in the skies above!
> 
> - **Nether additions**: new mobs, structures, and biomes spread across the Nether, adding a new level of difficulty and adventure to the underworld
> 
> - **New End structures** The End is no longer a barren wasteland, but a forgotten one with many new structures and biomes!
> 
> - **Bumblezone** for a different type of adventure, explore the Bee Dimension!
> 
> - **Dimensional Dungeons** is an entire dimension filled with procedurally generated dungeons to loot and explore for a roguelike adventure!


![The Squared Logo with an exponent of 2 with Dimension Expansion with Expansion spelled incorrectly to rhyme with Dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZEt8oXiN/images/500563be1d49423bfc9dc87c4b766aa53ee7cc7b.png)
